history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man stands on concrete stairs in front of a modern, multi-story building with a facade of green glass windows and white horizontal bands. He is wearing a light blue and white striped polo shirt and loose-fitting, dark brown wide-leg pants. His hands are clasped in front of him, and he is looking to his right. To his left, there is a metal railing with yellow and black striped markings on the ground. Behind the railing, an orange cylindrical bollard stands next to a blue pole. In the background, other people and vehicles are visible, and trees with lush green leaves are present on the left side of the frame, casting shadows. The lighting suggests it is daytime, with bright sunlight creating distinct shadows. The overall color palette is dominated by the cool tones of the building's glass and the man's shirt, contrasted with the earthy brown of his pants and the grey concrete. The mood is casual and relaxed.
